steps.title: Find the noun clause
steps.content: The model predicts that the rate of speciation on a distant island ____ triple the rate on a closer island. The that clause needs a finite main verb.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content:
• Choice A: Being is a participle and cannot serve as the clause's main verb.
  • Choice B: To be is an infinitive, not a finite verb.
  • Choice C: To have been is also an infinitive phrase.

steps.title: Use the finite prediction verb
steps.content: A finite future-tense verb completes the clause and matches the model's prediction about the island's speciation rate. The answer is D.
